notes: Ground-truth fixtures for ast-concern-matrix observation tool. Files reference real source paths (no copies). Two tool misclassifications found: WorkstreamAnalysisContainer and OpportunitiesFiltersContainer both have loading signals (renamed isLoading/isFetching destructured from query hooks and passed as props) but the tool reports MISSING_LOADING. The tool fails to detect renamed loading destructured properties.

observations.notes: isLoading and isFetching destructured from useTeamsHostTimeQuery and passed to ProductivityBlock.
No isError destructured. TODO(production-bug) on line 81 confirms known gap.
isFetching destructured from useTeamsListQuery and passed to TeamsBlock.
isError destructured, early return with QueryErrorFallback on line 65.
No empty state UI component. Teams array passed directly to block.
isLoading and isFetching destructured. Combined as 'isLoading || isFetching' and passed to block.
isError destructured, early return with QueryErrorFallback on line 92.
No dedicated empty state UI. filteredData defaults to empty array but no empty-state component.

TOOL DISAGREES (reports MISSING_LOADING). isWorkstreamsLoading, isWorkstreamsFetching, isHostLoading, isHostFetching all destructured with renames and passed as props. Tool misses renamed loading properties.
isWorkstreamsError destructured (renamed from isError), early return with QueryErrorFallback on line 171.
PlaceholderContainer wraps content, gated by 'enabled' flag (line 174).

TOOL DISAGREES (reports MISSING_LOADING). isTeamsLoading and isTeamsFetching destructured (renamed from isLoading/isFetching) and passed as props to OpportunitiesFilters. Tool misses renamed loading properties.
No isError destructured from useTeamsListQuery. No error fallback UI.
No empty state handling. Filter container may not need one (data presence is not its concern).
useAuthState for roles, isAdmin(roles) check gates team visibility.
